theme_archetype.primary_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
theme_archetype.mode: Both Light and Dark Mode (Dark mode explicitly required by user)
theme_archetype.rationale: Medical domain requires trust, calm, and approachability (Archetype 1). The 'premium Italian private specialist' aspect demands a touch of luxury and high-contrast sophistication (Archetype 5). Deep blue and fresh green act as our anchors to convey clinical excellence and fresh healing.

brand_identity.name: VicinoMed
brand_identity.tagline: La visita specialistica più vicina a te, con il medico giusto.
brand_identity.core_concept: Curated network of trusted private medical specialists in Italy.

rules: No pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for backgrounds. Always use tinted slate/blue.
Primary CTA uses Fresh Green (#00C48C) in dark mode for pop, and Deep Blue (#0A3D62) in light mode for trust.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA minimums. Avoid low-contrast text on colored backgrounds.
Use Outfit for a modern, premium, geometric feel.
Italian copy requires excellent legibility for accents (à, è, ì, ò, ù).

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl (16px) or rounded-3xl (24px) for all primary cards to ensure soft, premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Bento-style grids for dashboard, single-column smooth flow for mobile app views.
rules: High white space (generous padding inside cards: p-6 or p-8).
Adaptive UI for large screens: Expand mobile views into multi-column bento grids.

surfaces.cards: Soft shadows (shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/5) in light mode, subtle 1px border (border-white/10) in dark mode. Glassmorphism only for sticky headers/bottom nav.
surfaces.badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for trust signals (Verified Doctor, Rating, Specialty).

components.buttons: Large tap targets (h-14), rounded-2xl. Primary: solid color. Secondary: subtle background.
components.inputs: Shadcn input, rounded-xl, high contrast on focus.
components.map: Leaflet/OpenStreetMap integration with custom markers (Deep Blue/Fresh Green).
components.calendar: Shadcn calendar with custom rounded-xl active states.
components.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom, glassmorphic, 4-5 items max (Home, Map, Appointments, Profile).
rules: Include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-button').
WhatsApp buttons must use official brand green (#25D366) where appropriate, or inherit our fresh green.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for premium feel)
rules: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a lighter, more elegant look.

app_icon.description: Premium App Icon (Shield + Cross + Pin in Blue/Green), use for branding and splash screen

onboarding_light.description: Abstract Light Onboarding Background for initial user flow

onboarding_dark.description: Abstract Dark Onboarding Background for initial user flow in dark mode

clinic_interiors.description: Warm and inviting medical center reception

pages.name: Onboarding
pages.flow: 3-4 slides explaining 'Trova specialista', 'Prenota subito', 'Gestisci appuntamenti'. Uses full-bleed abstract backgrounds, glassmorphic text cards.

pages.name: Home (Patient)
pages.flow: Auto geolocation 'Vicino a te'. Smart search bar. Category pills (Cardiologia, Dermatologia). Horizontal scroll of 'Medici Consigliati'.

pages.name: Search & Map
pages.flow: Toggle between List and Map view. Map pins are Fresh Green. Bottom sheet for doctor preview when pin tapped.

pages.name: Doctor Profile
pages.flow: Hero image/portrait. Verified badge. Bio. Rating. 'Studi Medici' list. Date horizontal scroll -> Time slot grid. Sticky 'Prenota Visita' CTA at bottom.

pages.name: My Appointments
pages.flow: List of upcoming/past. Cards have WhatsApp deep-link buttons (Scrivi al medico, Disdici, Conferma).

pages.name: Doctor Dashboard
pages.flow: Bento grid layout. Quick stats. Upcoming patients list. Manage studio availability toggles.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React and Tailwind CSS.
Use Shadcn UI for interactive components (Tabs, Dialogs, Select, Calendar, Cards) but heavily customize them to match the border-radius (16px-24px) and colors defined here.
Implement a Dark Mode toggle. The app must look premium in both modes.
All copy must be strictly in professional Italian.
Ensure the layout is responsive (mobile-first for the app feel, adapting to larger screens like TV via grid expansions).
Use standard semantic HTML tags and proper data-testid attributes for testing.
Do not use placeholder images. Use the provided URLs in 'image_urls'.
